Moin moin 


desktop@ would like to ask for an exp-run to update devel/dbus to 1.14.0 .

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:

 https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-devel-dbus-update-to-1.14.0.patch

mfg Tobias
